zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯。
en: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块搅拌30秒。
en: Stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 过滤入预先冰镇的马天尼杯。
en: Strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: 以柠檬皮作装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 柠檬皮
en: Lemon twist

zh: 在杯口置放开槽调酒勺。
en: Place a channel bar spoon on the rim of the glass.

zh: 将方糖置于勺上，缓慢将冰冷的水滴淋其上，直至方糖完全溶解并落入杯中。
en: Place a sugar cube on the spoon, slowly drip cold water over it until the sugar cube completely dissolves and falls into the glass.

zh: 用勺轻拌使其进一步融合后享用。
en: Gently stir with the spoon to further integrate before enjoying.

zh: 无
en: No garnish.

zh: 将冰镇苏打水倒入已冰镇的小费兹杯或柯林斯杯。
en: Pour chilled soda water into a chilled small fizz or Collins glass.

zh: 其余配料入调酒杯，干摇5秒。
en: Add the remaining ingredients into the shaker and dry shake for 5 seconds.

zh: 加冰再摇10秒。
en: Add ice and shake for another 10 seconds.

zh: 滤入杯中，并用吧勺短拌以融合。
en: Strain into the glass and gently stir with a bar spoon to integrate.

zh: 不加装饰。
en: No garnish.

zh: 将所有配料倒入搅拌机，搅打至顺滑呈冰沙状。
en: Pour all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth and slushy.

zh: 倒入小号葡萄酒杯或有脚平底杯（传统苦艾杯）。
en: Pour into a small wine glass or a stemmed tumbler (traditional absinthe glass).

zh: 将全部配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。
en: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass and stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 纽约版：滤入装满碎冰或颗粒冰的碟形香槟杯。
en: New York style: Strain into a coupe glass filled with crushed or pebble ice.

zh: 加州版：滤入小水杯或小费兹杯（不加冰），再加入3 oz 冰镇苏打水。
en: California style: Strain into a small rocks glass or small fizz glass (no ice), then add 3 oz chilled soda water.

zh: 将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。
en: Add all ingredients except soda water into the shaker, add ice and shake thoroughly.

zh: 双重过滤入装满碎冰或刨冰的古典杯。
en: Double strain into an Old Fashioned glass filled with crushed or shaved ice.

zh: 添入苏打水。
en: Top with soda water.

zh: 以一片薄荷叶作装饰。
en: Garnish with a mint leaf.

zh: 薄荷叶
en: Mint leaf

zh: 除姜汁啤酒外的所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。
en: Add all ingredients except ginger beer into a shaker and shake well with ice.

zh: 滤入装有大冰块的柯林斯杯。
en: Strain into a Collins glass filled with large ice cubes.

zh: 加入姜汁啤酒，轻轻搅拌融合。
en: Add ginger beer and gently stir to combine.

zh: 以青柠角作装饰。
en: Garnish with a lime wedge.

zh: 青柠角
en: Lime wedge

zh: 用手压榨汁器将青柠直接压入调酒杯，并加入用过的果皮。
en: Squeeze lime directly into the shaker using a citrus press and add the used peel.

zh: 除苏打水外加入其他配料，加冰充分摇匀。
en: Add all ingredients except soda water, and shake well with ice.

zh: 加入苏打水，轻拌融合。
en: Add soda water and gently stir to combine.

zh: 以橙皮作装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 橙皮
en: Orange twist

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌15秒以融合。
en: Add all ingredients into a shaker and stir with ice for 15 seconds to combine.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。
en: Add all ingredients into a shaker and stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 以橙皮装饰：用开槽刀沿整颗橙子环绕削取一条细长橙皮，垂挂于杯沿如猫尾。
en: Garnish with an orange twist: Use a channel knife to cut a long thin orange peel around the entire orange and hang it on the rim like a cat's tail.

zh: 橙皮（细长条，垂挂杯沿）
en: Orange twist (long thin strip hanging on the rim)

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯，加冰充分摇匀。
en: Add all ingredients into a shaker and shake well with ice.

zh: 双重过滤入预先冰镇的马天尼杯。
en: Double strain into a pre-chilled martini glass.

zh: 将配料加入调酒杯，加冰搅拌30秒。
en: Add the ingredients into the mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。
en: Add all ingredients into the mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块并搅拌30秒。
en: Add ice and stir for 30 seconds.

zh: 过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: 用橙皮装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 将水果和苦精加入调酒玻璃杯中并捣碎。
en: Add fruit and bitters into the mixing glass and muddle.

zh: 加入剩余配料。
en: Add the remaining ingredients.

zh: 加入冰块并充分摇匀。
en: Add ice and shake well.

zh: 双重过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: 将金酒和黑可可利口酒加入调酒玻璃杯中。
en: Add gin and black Crème de Cacao into the mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块并搅拌20秒。
en: Add ice and stir for 20 seconds.

zh: 过滤至冰镇的雪利酒杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled sherry glass.

zh: 用吧勺背面将淡奶油缓慢漂浮在顶层。
en: Slowly float the light cream on top using the back of a bar spoon.

zh: 用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 用橙皮和柠檬皮装饰。
en: Garnish with orange twist and lemon twist.

zh: 将除普罗塞克外的所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。
en: Add all ingredients except Prosecco into the mixing glass.

zh: 过滤至冰镇的香槟碟形杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled champagne coupe.

zh: 漂浮1盎司普罗塞克。
en: Float 1 ounce of Prosecco.

zh: 无装饰。
en: No garnish.

zh: 用白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Garnish with a brandied cherry.

zh: 白兰地樱桃
en: Brandy cherry

zh: 将配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。
en: Add ingredients to the mixing glass.

zh: 用鲜薄荷枝装饰。
en: Garnish with fresh mint sprig.

zh: 鲜薄荷枝
en: Fresh mint sprig

zh: 将薄荷和苦精加入柯林斯杯中，轻轻捣碎以释放香气。
en: Add mint and bitters to a Collins glass and gently muddle to release the aroma.

zh: 然后加入柠檬汁和金酒。
en: Then add lemon juice and gin.

zh: 加满冰块并加入干姜水。
en: Fill with ice and add ginger ale.

zh: 搅拌均匀。
en: Stir to combine.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯，加入冰并充分摇匀。
en: Add all ingredients to the shaker, add ice, and shake well.

zh: 滤入已冷却的碟形杯（鸡尾酒杯）。
en: Strain into a chilled coupe glass.

zh: 装饰并放入白兰地樱桃。
en: Garnish and add a brandy cherry.

zh: 滤入装有碎冰或刨冰的古典杯或碟形香槟杯。
en: Strain into an old fashioned glass or coupe glass filled with crushed or shaved ice.

zh: 用橙皮点缀，释放橙皮油后放入杯中；随杯附小金属吸管上桌。
en: Garnish with an orange twist; express the orange oils over the glass and add the twist; serve with a small metal straw.

zh: 滤入已冷却的碟形鸡尾酒杯。
en: Strain into a chilled coupe cocktail glass.

zh: 用青柠片装饰。
en: Garnish with a lime wedge.

zh: 青柠轮
en: Lime wheel

zh: 滤入装有刨冰或碎冰的碟形杯或杯中。
en: Strain into a coupe glass or glass filled with shaved or crushed ice.

zh: 用青柠轮装饰。
en: Garnish with a lime wheel.

zh: 将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒以充分整合。
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass, add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds to fully integrate.

zh: 滤入已冷却的碟形杯。
en: Strain into a chilled coupe glass.

zh: 用橙皮装饰（作者建议用橙皮以提升风味）。
en: Garnish with an orange twist (the author recommends using an orange twist to enhance the flavor).

zh: 将朗姆酒与所选的干或甜苦艾酒加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒。
en: Add rum and the chosen dry or sweet vermouth into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 30 seconds.

zh: 可在杯边喷洒新鲜橙或柠檬皮以增香。
en: Spray fresh orange or lemon peel around the glass rim to enhance aroma.

zh: 橙皮喷香（可选）
en: Orange peel spray (optional)

zh: 将橙皮在古典杯上扭出油，放入杯中。
en: Express the oils of the orange peel over the old fashioned glass and drop it into the glass.

zh: 加入苦精并稍微捣揉以释放风味。
en: Add bitters and gently muddle to release the flavors.

zh: 将金酒与干/甜苦艾酒倒入同一杯中，加入冰并搅拌以整合风味。
en: Pour gin and dry/sweet vermouth into the same glass, add ice and stir to integrate the flavors.

zh: 可再添加额外橙皮作为装饰。
en: Additional orange twist can be added as garnish.

zh: 在装有大冰块的古典杯中加入所有材料，短暂搅拌以整合风味。
en: Add all ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with large ice cubes, stir briefly to integrate flavors.

zh: 用橙皮装饰并上桌。
en: Garnish with an orange twist and serve.

zh: 将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约15秒以整合。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 15 seconds to integrate.

zh: 滤入装有大冰块或球冰的古典杯。
en: Strain into an old fashioned glass filled with large or sphere ice.

zh: 可用白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Can be garnished with brandied cherries.

zh: 将所有配料加入混合杯，加入冰并搅拌约30秒。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass, add ice and stir for about 30 seconds.

zh: 将冷却的苏打水倒入小柯林斯或菲兹杯备用。
en: Pour chilled soda water into a small Collins or fizz glass and set aside.

zh: 将其余配料加入调酒杯，先干摇约5秒以乳化蛋白。
en: Add the remaining ingredients into a shaker, dry shake for about 5 seconds to emulsify the egg white.

zh: 加入冰再摇约10秒。
en: Add ice and shake for about 10 seconds.

zh: 将混合物滤入已装苏打水的菲兹杯中，轻轻搅拌以整合（无额外装饰）。
en: Double strain the mixture into the fizz glass containing soda water, gently stir to integrate (No garnish).

zh: 在小号柯林斯杯或费兹杯中加入冰镇苏打水。
en: Add chilled soda water into a small Collins or fizz glass filled with ice.

zh: 将剩余配料加入调酒杯。
en: Add the remaining ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 干摇5秒。
en: Dry shake for 5 seconds.

zh: 加冰摇和10秒。
en: Shake with ice for 10 seconds.

zh: 过滤至费兹杯中。
en: Strain into a fizz glass.

zh: 短暂搅拌以混合。
en: Stir briefly to combine.

zh: 加冰充分摇和。
en: Shake vigorously with ice.

zh: 过滤至冰镇马天尼杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: 以柠檬皮卷装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 柠檬皮卷
en: Lemon twist

zh: 将配料加入调酒杯。
en: Add ingredients into the shaker.

zh: 以一根野牛草装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemongrass stalk.

zh: 一根野牛草
en: Lemongrass stalk

zh: 冰镇所有配料。
en: Chill all ingredients.

zh: 这有助于防止调制过程中溢出，并确保以正确且最适宜的温度饮用。
en: This helps prevent overflow during mixing and ensures the drink is served at the correct and optimal temperature.

zh: 将烈酒和苦精加入柯林斯杯。
en: Add spirits and bitters into a Collins glass.

zh: 加入大方冰，注满苏打水。
en: Add large ice cubes and fill with soda water.

zh: 以橙皮（或柠檬皮）装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange twist (or lemon twist).

zh: 橙皮（或柠檬皮）
en: Orange twist (or lemon twist)

zh: 将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯。
en: Add all ingredients except soda water into the shaker.

zh: 双重过滤至装满标准方冰的柯林斯杯中。
en: Double strain into a Collins glass filled with standard large ice cubes.

zh: 顶部注满苏打水。
en: Top with soda water.

zh: 以新鲜浆果装饰。
en: Garnish with fresh berries.

zh: 新鲜浆果
en: Fresh berries

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯，干摇5秒。
en: Add all ingredients into a shaker and dry shake for 5 seconds.

zh: Add ice and shake well for 10 seconds.
en: Add ice and shake well for 10 seconds.

zh: 双重过滤至装满标准方冰的古典杯中。
en: Double strain into a rocks glass filled with large square ice.

zh: 以罗勒叶装饰。
en: Garnish with basil leaves.

zh: 罗勒叶
en: Basil leaves

zh: 将除红甜椒粉外的所有配料加入调酒杯。
en: Add all ingredients except the smoked paprika into a shaker.

zh: 加冰搅拌30秒。
en: Stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 在鸡尾酒顶部撒少许红甜椒粉完成。
en: Sprinkle a pinch of smoked paprika on top of the cocktail to finish.

zh: 以柠檬皮装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 以橙皮装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 以白兰地樱桃和柠檬皮卷装饰。
en: Garnish with brandied cherry and a lemon twist.

zh: 将两片大橙皮扭转挤油入古典杯或平底杯中。
en: Twist two large orange peels over a rocks glass or old-fashioned glass to release oils.

zh: 装满碎冰或刨冰。
en: Fill with crushed or shaved ice.

zh: 加入配料。
en: Add ingredients.

zh: 额外扭转两片橙皮作为装饰。
en: Extra twist two orange peels as garnish.

zh: 配以小金属吸管饮用。
en: Serve with a small metal straw.

zh: 两片橙皮
en: Two orange peels

zh: 双重过滤至冰镇马天尼杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: 将薄巧克力意式脆饼横放在杯口。
en: Place a thin chocolate biscotti horizontally on the rim of the glass.

zh: 薄巧克力意式脆饼
en: Thin chocolate biscotti

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并充分摇匀。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 用橙皮装饰。
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 用橙皮装饰。
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 将配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Add ingredients to a mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 将配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 用柠檬皮和橙皮装饰。
en: Add ingredients to a mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist and orange twist.

zh: lemon and 橙皮
en: Lemon twist and orange twist

zh: Add chilled club soda to small Collins glass. Add remaining ingredients to mixing glass. 加冰并充分摇匀。 Strain into Collins glass. Stir briefly to integrate. 无装饰。
en: Add chilled club soda to small Collins glass. Add remaining ingredients to mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into Collins glass. Stir briefly to integrate. No garnish.

zh: Add infused vodka to chilled Collins glass. Add large ice cubes and fill with club soda. Top with grenadine. Garnish with lemon peel and brandied cherry. Place all ingredients in airtight glass container for 7 days. Fine-strain and funnel back into bottle. Best if used within 3 months.
en: Add infused vodka to chilled Collins glass. Add large ice cubes and fill with club soda. Top with grenadine. Garnish with lemon twist and brandied cherry. Place all ingredients in airtight glass container for 7 days. Fine-strain and funnel back into bottle. Best if used within 3 months.

zh: 柠檬皮 and 白兰地樱桃
en: Lemon twist and brandied cherry

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 无装饰。
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. No garnish.

zh: Add water and molasses to Old Fashioned glass and stir to combine. Add rum and stir to combine. Fill with crushed or pellet ice. Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.
en: Add water and molasses to Old Fashioned glass and stir to combine. Add rum and stir to combine. Fill with crushed or pellet ice. Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.

zh: 现磨肉豆蔻
en: Freshly grated nutmeg

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并充分摇匀。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 Garnish with flamed orange coin (optional) and brandied cherry.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with flamed orange coin (optional) and brandied cherry.

zh: 火焰橙皮硬币 (optional) and 白兰地樱桃
en: Flamed orange coin (optional) and brandied cherry

zh: Add all ingredients to airtight sealable plastic container and shake to combine. Place on shallow plate. Using fresh lemon wedge, moisten half of rim of glass and roll rim through the mixture. Fill with large ice cubes. Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times. Strain into prepared Collins glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass.
en: Add all ingredients to airtight sealable plastic container and shake to combine. Place on shallow plate. Using fresh lemon wedge, moisten half of rim of glass and roll rim through the mixture. Fill with large ice cubes. Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times. Strain into prepared Collins glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass.

zh: ⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass
en: ⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass

zh: Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times and transfer to chilled Collins glass. Place lemon wedge on side of glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk. Optional garnish: prepare skewer with Peppadew (sweet pepper), cornichon (small French pickle), cocktail onion, and Queen Anne olive and place across top of glass.
en: Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times and transfer to chilled Collins glass. Place lemon wedge on side of glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk. Optional garnish: prepare skewer with Peppadew (sweet pepper), cornichon (small French pickle), cocktail onion, and Queen Anne olive and place across top of glass.

zh: ⅓ celery stalk
en: ⅓ celery stalk

zh: Add ingredients to Collins glass. Add ice and stir briefly to integrate. 用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Add ingredients to Collins glass. Add ice and stir briefly to integrate. Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。 加冰并充分摇匀。 双重过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 Garnish with 1 mint leaf.
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with 1 mint leaf.

zh: 1 薄荷叶
en: Mint leaf

zh: 将所有配料加入古典杯中，加入方冰或碎冰。
en: Add all ingredients into an old fashioned glass with a large ice cube or crushed ice.

zh: 轻轻搅拌使其融合。
en: Gently stir to combine.

zh: 除黑莓利口酒外，将其他配料倒入调酒杯，加入冰块，充分摇匀。
en: Pour all ingredients except blackberry liqueur into a shaker, add ice, and shake well.

zh: 将摇好的酒液滤入装有碎冰的古典杯中。
en: Strain the shaken mixture into an old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.

zh: 最后倒入黑莓利口酒浮于表面。
en: Finally, pour the blackberry liqueur to float on top.

zh: 用一颗新鲜黑莓串作装饰。
en: Garnish with a fresh blackberry skewer.

zh: 新鲜黑莓串
en: Fresh blackberry skewer

zh: 除罗勒叶、Combier红色水果利口酒和苏打水外，将所有配料加入搅拌杯，干摇5秒。
en: Add all ingredients except basil leaves, Combier red fruit liqueur, and soda water into a mixing glass and dry shake for 5 seconds.

zh: 加入罗勒叶和冰块，继续摇合10秒。
en: Add basil leaves and ice, then continue shaking for 10 seconds.

zh: 使用细滤器将饮品滤入装有大方冰的古典杯中。
en: Use a fine strainer to strain the drink into an old fashioned glass with a large ice cube.

zh: 加入冰镇苏打水，轻轻搅拌融合。
en: Add chilled soda water and gently stir to combine.

zh: 最后将红色水果利口酒轻浮于表面。
en: Finally, float the red fruit liqueur on top.

zh: 将所有配料加入搅拌杯。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块，搅拌30秒。
en: Add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 滤入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

zh: 按顺序将所有配料加入小马杯或小雪利酒杯中。
en: Add all ingredients in order into a pony glass or small sherry glass.

zh: 滤入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。
en: Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

zh: 先用柠檬角润湿小高脚杯或葡萄酒杯杯口约半寸。
en: Moisten the rim of a small stemmed glass or wine glass about half an inch using a lemon wedge.

zh: 随后轻轻将杯口沾裹细砂糖形成糖边。
en: Gently rim the glass with fine sugar to create a sugar edge.

zh: 将所有配料倒入调酒杯，加入冰块搅拌30秒。
en: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass, add ice, and stir with ice for 30 seconds.

zh: 用滤网滤入准备好的杯中。
en: Strain into the prepared glass using a strainer.

zh: 将一整条柠檬皮卷曲置于杯内壁作为装饰。
en: Place a whole lemon twist curled along the inside wall of the glass as a garnish.

zh: 在古典杯中放入三块大方冰或一颗大球冰。
en: Add three large square ice cubes or one large ice sphere to the old-fashioned glass.

zh: 倒入苏打水。
en: Top with soda water.

zh: 慢慢将干邑白兰地漂浮在苏打水上层。
en: Slowly float Cognac on top of the soda water.

zh: 轻扭橙皮以释放香油后弃用。
en: Twist an orange peel gently to release the oils, then discard.

zh: 将所有原料倒入调酒杯。
en: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 加入大方冰，在调酒杯与摇杯之间滚动3到5次。
en: Add large square ice cubes and roll between the mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times.

zh: 倒入古典杯或Hoffman House款式高脚杯。
en: Pour into an old-fashioned glass or Hoffman House style stemmed glass.

zh: 用新鲜当季水果装饰。
en: Garnish with fresh seasonal fruit.

zh: 季节鲜果
en: Seasonal fresh fruit

zh: 将所有材料倒入调酒杯中。
en: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块，摇匀。
en: Add ice and shake well.

zh: 滤入已冷却的鸡尾酒杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

zh: 将橙味苦精和一块菠萝放入调酒杯，轻轻捣碎。
en: Add orange bitters and a piece of pineapple into the mixing glass, and gently muddle.

zh: 加入其余全部材料。
en: Add all remaining ingredients.

zh: 双重过滤倒入已冷却的鸡尾酒杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

zh: 以一块菠萝装饰。
en: Garnish with a piece of pineapple.

zh: 菠萝片
en: Pineapple slice

zh: 将所有配料倒入搅拌杯中。
en: Pour all ingredients into the mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块，充分摇和。
en: Add ice and shake well.

zh: 过滤倒入冰镇好的古典杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled old fashioned glass.

zh: 装饰柠檬皮。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist

zh: 加入冰块，搅拌15秒。
en: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯。加入冰块，搅拌30秒。过滤倒入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Add all ingredients to the mixing glass. Add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 将所选柑橘汁挤入柯林斯杯中，可加入果皮（可选）。加入冰块。加入基酒，最后加入姜汁汽水或姜汁啤酒。
en: Squeeze the chosen citrus juice into a Collins glass, optionally add the peel. Add ice. Add the base spirit, and finish with ginger ale or ginger beer.

zh: 将金酒加入调酒杯。加入冰块，搅拌30秒。过滤倒入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。用Queen Anne橄榄装饰。
en: Add gin to the mixing glass. Add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with Queen Anne olives.

zh: Queen Anne橄榄
en: Queen Anne olives

zh: 将蛋清和简单糖浆加入调酒杯，干摇5秒。加入剩余配料，加入冰块，摇和10秒。双重过滤倒入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯或小葡萄酒杯。
en: Add egg white and simple syrup to the mixing glass, dry shake for 5 seconds. Add the remaining ingredients and ice, shake for 10 seconds. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass or small wine glass.

zh: 将青柠和糖加入调酒杯，捣碎以释放油脂和汁液。加入卡莎萨和冰块。摇匀后倒入古典杯。
en: Add lime and sugar to the mixing glass, muddle to release oils and juice. Add cachaça and ice. Shake and pour into an old fashioned glass.

zh: 将配料加入调酒杯。加入冰块，搅拌15秒。过滤倒入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Add ingredients to the mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 15 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 将配料加入调酒杯。加入冰块，搅拌30秒。过滤倒入小鸡尾酒杯。用柠檬皮装饰。
en: Add ingredients to the mixing glass. Add ice and stir with ice for 30 seconds. Strain into a small cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 将除盐以外的所有配料加入调酒杯。加入冰块，摇匀。双重过滤倒入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。顶部撒少许盐。
en: Add all ingredients except salt to the mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Top with a pinch of salt.

zh: 将糖块放在小盘上，滴上苦精。将糖块放入香槟杯中，倒入香槟。扭转柠檬皮释放油脂后丢弃。
en: Place a sugar cube on a small plate and add bitters. Place the sugar cube into a champagne flute and pour champagne. Twist a lemon peel to release oils and discard.

zh: 将冷藏浸泡的Galliano倒入香槟杯。加入香槟至满。
en: Pour chilled Galliano into a champagne flute. Fill with champagne.

zh: 将香槟倒入笛形香槟杯或鸡尾酒杯。将绿色查特酒和樱桃白兰地加入调酒杯，加入冰块，轻搅冷却融合。缓慢过滤倒入杯中。
en: Pour champagne into a flute or cocktail glass. Add green chartreuse and cherry brandy to the mixing glass, add ice and stir lightly to chill and blend. Slowly strain into the glass.

zh: 将香槟倒入笛形香槟杯或鸡尾酒杯。将其他配料加入调酒杯，加入冰块，轻搅冷却融合。缓慢过滤倒入杯中。扭转柠檬皮释放油脂后丢弃。
en: Pour champagne into a flute or cocktail glass. Add the other ingredients to the mixing glass, add ice and stir lightly to chill and blend. Slowly strain into the glass. Twist a lemon peel to release oils and discard.

zh: 将起泡酒倒入笛形香槟杯或鸡尾酒杯。将伏特加和覆盆子酸甜酒加入调酒杯，加入冰块，轻搅冷却融合。缓慢过滤倒入杯中。扭转柠檬皮释放油脂后丢弃。
en: Pour sparkling wine into a flute or cocktail glass. Add vodka and raspberry liqueur to the mixing glass, add ice and stir lightly to chill and blend. Slowly strain into the glass. Twist a lemon peel to release oils and discard.

zh: 过滤至装有大冰块或冰球的古典杯或霍夫曼豪斯高脚杯中。
en: Strain into a rocks glass or Hofmann Haus stemmed glass filled with large ice cubes or an ice sphere.

zh: 短暂搅拌以融合。
en: Stir briefly to combine.

zh: 用柑橘轮和/或时令水果装饰。
en: Garnish with a citrus wheel and/or seasonal fruit.

zh: 柑橘轮和/或时令水果
en: Citrus wheel and/or seasonal fruit

zh: 在柯林斯杯中加冰。
en: Fill a Collins glass with ice.

zh: 加入味美思和黑醋栗利口酒。
en: Add vermouth and blackcurrant liqueur.

zh: 倒入苏打水并快速搅拌以融合。
en: Top with soda water and stir quickly to combine.

zh: 用橙皮和白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange peel and brandied cherry.

zh: 橙皮和白兰地樱桃
en: Orange peel and brandied cherry

zh: 顶部撒上小巧克力卷或碎屑作为装饰。
en: Top with chocolate curls or shavings as garnish.

zh: 小巧克力卷或碎屑
en: Chocolate curls or shavings

zh: 将所有配料加入古典杯中。
en: Add all ingredients to a rocks glass.

zh: 加入大冰块或冰球。
en: Add a large ice cube or ice sphere.

zh: 将金酒和苦精加入调酒杯中。
en: Add gin and bitters to a mixing glass.

zh: 将苏打水直接加入鸡尾酒中。
en: Add soda water directly to the cocktail.

zh: 在表面扭转柠檬皮释放精油，然后丢弃。
en: Twist a lemon peel over the surface to release oils, then discard.

zh: 柠檬皮精油
en: Lemon peel oils

zh: 将波特酒倒入量酒器中，沿着杯壁边缘倒入，使其顺着杯壁滑下。
en: Pour port into a jigger and slowly pour down the side of the glass to coat the inside.

zh: 扭转柠檬皮和橙皮释放精油，然后丢弃。
en: Twist lemon and orange peels over the surface to release oils, then discard.

zh: 柠檬皮和橙皮精油
en: Lemon and orange peel oils

zh: 将葡萄酒和覆盆子糖浆加入冰镇的柯林斯杯中。
en: Add wine and raspberry syrup to a chilled Collins glass.

zh: 加入大方冰。
en: Add large ice cubes.

zh: 加入柠檬苏打水并搅拌均匀。
en: Add lemon soda and stir gently.

zh: 用薄荷枝装饰。
en: Garnish with a sprig of mint.

zh: 过滤至装有大方冰或球冰的冰镇古典杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with large ice cubes or an ice sphere.

zh: 用橙皮卷装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: 橙皮卷
en: Orange twist

zh: 将除苦精外的所有配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add all ingredients except bitters to a mixing glass.

zh: 过滤至装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯中。
en: Strain into a rocks glass filled with large ice cubes or an ice sphere.

zh: 在顶部滴入苦精。
en: Dash bitters on top.

zh: 用垂直插在杯口的胡萝卜片装饰。
en: Garnish with a vertically placed carrot slice on the rim.

zh: 胡萝卜片
en: Carrot slice

zh: 将冰镇苏打水加入小号柯林斯杯中。
en: Add chilled soda water to a small Collins glass.

zh: 过滤至柯林斯杯中。
en: Strain into a Collins glass.

zh: 用吧勺快速搅拌均匀。
en: Stir quickly with a bar spoon to combine.

zh: 用薄荷枝和柠檬皮装饰。
en: Garnish with a sprig of mint and a lemon peel.

zh: 薄荷枝+柠檬皮
en: Mint sprig and lemon peel

zh: 短暂搅拌使其融合（不加冰）。
en: Stir briefly to combine without ice.

zh: 倒入雪利酒鸡尾酒杯中。
en: Pour into a chilled sherry cocktail glass.

zh: 用柠檬皮卷装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 用柠檬皮扭转装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist.

zh: 柠檬皮扭转
en: Lemon twist

zh: 旁边配三块小黄油饼干一起上桌。
en: Serve alongside three small butter cookies.

zh: 倒入冰镇的古典杯中直接饮用。
en: Pour into a chilled Old Fashioned glass and serve.

zh: 用柠檬皮和浸泡白兰地的樱桃串装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon twist and brandy-soaked cherry skewer.

zh: 柠檬皮+浸白兰地樱桃串
en: Lemon twist and brandy-soaked cherry skewer

zh: 将除波特酒外的所有配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add all ingredients except the port wine into a mixing glass.

zh: 滤入装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯或Hoffman House酒杯中。
en: Strain into an Old Fashioned glass or Hoffman House glass filled with large ice cubes or a sphere.

zh: 将波特酒轻轻浮在表面。
en: Gently float the port wine on top.

zh: 可选用一颗覆盆子作装饰。
en: Optional garnish: one raspberry.

zh: 覆盆子（可选）
en: Raspberry (optional)

zh: 将所有配料加入搅拌杯中。加入冰块，搅拌30秒。过滤倒入冰镇鸡尾酒杯中。用白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a brandy cherry.

zh: 黑樱桃浸泡波本威士忌制作方法：将所有配料放入密封玻璃容器中，冷藏7天后细滤，倒回瓶中。建议两个月内使用完毕。
en: Black cherry bourbon infusion method: Place all ingredients in a sealed glass container and refrigerate for 7 days. Fine strain and return to the bottle. Consume within two months.

zh: 潘趣呈现：除白兰地外，将所有配料加入调酒杯，加入冰块，充分摇和。滤入装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯或Hoffman House高脚杯。顶部加入白兰地。用橙皮和白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Punch presentation: Add all ingredients except brandy into a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass or Hoffman House stemmed glass filled with large ice cubes or a sphere. Top with brandy. Garnish with an orange peel and brandy cherry.

zh: 酸酒呈现：除白兰地外，将所有配料加入调酒杯，加入冰块，充分摇和。滤入冰镇的鸡尾酒杯。用白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Sour presentation: Add all ingredients except brandy into a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a brandy cherry.

zh: 橙皮+白兰地樱桃 / 白兰地樱桃
en: Orange peel and brandy cherry / brandy cherry

zh: 将所有配料加入搅拌杯中。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 过滤倒入装有碎冰的古典杯或Hoffman House高脚杯中。
en: Strain into an Old Fashioned glass or Hoffman House stemmed glass filled with crushed ice.

zh: 用白兰地樱桃和橙片装饰（可选季节性浆果）。
en: Garnish with a brandy cherry and orange slice (seasonal berries optional).

zh: 白兰地樱桃+橙片
en: Brandy cherry and orange slice

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。加入冰块，充分摇匀。滤入装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯或Hoffman House高脚杯中。用白兰地樱桃和橙片装饰（可选季节性浆果）。
en: Add all ingredients into a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass or Hoffman House stemmed glass filled with large ice cubes or a sphere. Garnish with a brandy cherry and orange slice (seasonal berries optional).

zh: 滤入冰镇的碟形杯中。
en: Strain into a chilled coupe glass.

zh: 将任选基酒和简单糖浆倒入古典杯中，轻轻搅拌使其融合。
en: Pour the chosen base spirit and simple syrup into an Old Fashioned glass and stir gently to combine.

zh: 加入几块大方冰或冰球，再次搅拌均匀。
en: Add several large ice cubes or an ice sphere and stir again to chill.

zh: 冷托迪
en: Cold toddy

zh: 将任选基酒、冷水和简单糖浆倒入古典杯中，轻轻搅拌使其融合。
en: Pour the chosen base spirit, cold water, and simple syrup into an Old Fashioned glass and stir gently to combine.

zh: 将冰镇姜汁汽水倒入小型柯林斯杯或菲兹杯中。
en: Pour chilled ginger ale into a small Collins or fizz glass.

zh: 将其余材料倒入调酒杯中。
en: Pour the remaining ingredients into a mixing glass.

zh: 加入冰块，摇和10秒。
en: Add ice and shake for 10 seconds.

zh: 双重过滤倒入柯林斯杯中。
en: Double strain into a Collins glass.

zh: 将冷藏苏打水倒入小号柯林斯杯中。
en: Pour chilled soda water into a small Collins glass.

zh: 将其余材料倒入调酒杯中，进行干摇5秒。
en: Pour the remaining ingredients into a mixing glass and dry shake for 5 seconds.

zh: 将酒液过滤倒入柯林斯杯或菲兹杯中。
en: Strain the cocktail into a Collins or fizz glass.

zh: 用吧勺轻轻搅拌以融合材料。
en: Stir gently with a bar spoon to combine ingredients.

zh: 滤入Hoffman House酒杯或葡萄酒杯，内放大方冰或冰球。
en: Strain into a Hoffman House glass or wine glass filled with large ice cubes or an ice sphere.

zh: 制作方法一（现代）
en: Method One (Modern)

zh: 将所有材料倒入调酒杯，加入冰块，充分摇匀。滤入带脚酸味杯或矮杯中。以搭配基酒的柑橘皮和白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a stemmed sour glass or rocks glass. Garnish with a citrus peel and brandy cherry that complement the base spirit.

zh: 制作方法二（现代含蛋清）
en: Method Two (Modern with egg white)

zh: 将材料倒入调酒杯，先干摇5秒，再加入冰块摇10秒。双重过滤入冰镇鸡尾酒杯。以搭配基酒的柑橘皮和白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Pour ingredients into a mixing glass and dry shake for 5 seconds. Add ice and shake for 10 seconds. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a citrus peel and brandy cherry that complement the base spirit.

zh: 制作方法三（现代纽约、布伦瑞克或华尔道夫酸味，无蛋清）
en: Method Three (Modern New York, Brunswick, or Waldorf sour, no egg white)

zh: 将所有材料倒入调酒杯，加入冰块充分摇匀。滤入装有大冰块的老式柯林斯杯。用量杯量取半盎司干红酒，沿勺背缓缓倒入杯中形成漂浮层。配吸管饮用，无需其他装饰。
en: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass and shake vigorously with ice. Strain into an old-fashioned Collins glass filled with a large ice cube. Measure out half an ounce of dry red wine and slowly pour it over the back of a spoon to create a floating layer. Serve with a straw. No garnish.

zh: 柑橘皮+白兰地樱桃
en: Citrus peel and brandied cherry

zh: 将糖和冰水加入冰镇古典杯中。
en: Add sugar and ice water to a chilled old-fashioned glass.

zh: 挤入柠檬汁，弃去柠檬壳，搅拌均匀。
en: Squeeze in lemon juice, discard the lemon peel, and stir until well combined.

zh: 加入所选基酒和冰块。
en: Add the chosen base spirit and ice.

zh: 轻轻搅拌融合，建议使用滚动法（将酒杯与摇酒器之间来回滚动一两次）以获得最佳效果。
en: Stir gently to combine, preferably using the rolling method by rolling the glass back and forth between your hands once or twice for best results.

zh: 将除苏打水外的所有材料倒入调酒杯中。
en: Pour all ingredients except soda water into a mixing glass.

zh: 滤入装有大方冰的古典杯或Hoffman House高脚杯中。
en: Strain into an old-fashioned glass or Hoffman House stemmed glass filled with large square ice.

zh: 加入苏打水，轻轻搅拌均匀。
en: Add soda water and stir gently to combine.

zh: 用柠檬片和白兰地樱桃装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon wheel and brandied cherry.

zh: 柠檬片+白兰地樱桃
en: Lemon wheel and brandied cherry

zh: 将冰镇的苹果酒倒入有脚的酒杯或波尔多风格的葡萄酒杯中。
en: Pour chilled cider into a stemmed glass or Bordeaux-style wine glass.

zh: 然后倒入冰镇的苹果白兰地。
en: Then add chilled apple brandy.

zh: 可选用新鲜研磨的肉豆蔻进行装饰。
en: Optionally garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.

zh: 将所有材料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass.

zh: 使用双重过滤倒入冰镇的碟形杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled coupe glass.

zh: 用小草莓切口挂于杯口装饰。
en: Garnish by hanging a small strawberry with a slit on the rim of the glass.

zh: 小草莓
en: Small strawberry

zh: 将草莓、罗勒叶、薄荷叶、糖和柠檬汁（或酸磷酸盐）放入调酒杯中。
en: Place strawberries, basil leaves, mint leaves, sugar, and lemon juice (or sour mix) into a mixing glass.

zh: 用捣棒轻轻捣碎，释放草莓汁液。
en: Gently muddle to release the strawberry juice.

zh: 加入金酒、橙汁和冰块。
en: Add gin, orange juice, and ice.

zh: 充分摇匀后，使用双重过滤倒入装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯中。
en: Shake well and double strain into an old-fashioned glass filled with large square or sphere ice.

zh: 将冷藏的苏打水加入小号柯林斯杯或菲兹杯中。
en: Add chilled soda water to a small Collins or fizz glass.

zh: 将剩余配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add the remaining ingredients to the mixing glass.

zh: 双重过滤至柯林斯杯中。
en: Double strain into a Collins glass.

zh: 用吧勺快速搅拌以融合。
en: Stir quickly with a bar spoon to combine.

zh: 用现磨肉豆蔻装饰(可选)。
en: Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg (optional).

zh: 现磨肉豆蔻(可选)
en: Freshly grated nutmeg (optional)

zh: 用橙皮或柠檬皮装饰。
en: Garnish with an orange or lemon twist.

zh: 橙皮或柠檬皮
en: Orange or lemon twist

zh: 将刨冰加入碟形杯或小葡萄酒杯中。
en: Add crushed ice to a coupe or small wine glass.

zh: 按顺序倒入配料。
en: Pour ingredients in order.

zh: 用时令浆果和新鲜薄荷装饰(可选)。
en: Garnish with seasonal berries and fresh mint (optional).

zh: 配小吸管饮用。
en: Serve with a small straw.

zh: 时令浆果和新鲜薄荷(可选)
en: Seasonal berries and fresh mint (optional)

zh: 将配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add ingredients to a mixing glass.

zh: 加冰短暂搅拌以融合。
en: Add ice and stir briefly to combine.

zh: 过滤至装满碎冰或颗粒冰的古典杯或Hoffman House高脚杯中。
en: Strain into an old-fashioned glass or Hoffman House stemmed glass filled with crushed or pebble ice.

zh: 配吸管饮用。
en: Serve with a straw.

zh: 过滤至装有一两块大冰块的茶杯或古典杯中。
en: Strain into a tea cup or old-fashioned glass containing one or two large ice cubes.

zh: 将所有配料加入柯林斯杯中。
en: Add all ingredients to a Collins glass.

zh: 加冰搅拌以融合。
en: Add ice and stir to combine.

zh: 用柠檬轮装饰。
en: Garnish with a lemon wheel.

zh: 柠檬轮
en: Lemon wheel

zh: 将金酒和开胃酒加入古典杯中。
en: Add gin and vermouth to an Old Fashioned glass.

zh: 顶部滴入苦精。
en: Top with a few dashes of bitters.

zh: 将菠萝角和柑橘皮加入调酒杯中。
en: Add pineapple wedge and citrus peel to a mixing glass.

zh: 短暂捣碎以释放精华。
en: Muddle briefly to release the oils.

zh: 用一枝百里香横放在杯口装饰。
en: Garnish with a sprig of thyme laid across the rim.

zh: 一枝百里香
en: Sprig of thyme

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： lemon peel.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： orange twist.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

zh: Add bitters, radish, and cucumber slices to mixing glass. Muddle to break down and release flavors. Add vodka and syrup. 加冰充分摇匀。 If presenting with rim, moisten half of cocktail glass with lemon wedge, then roll that side of glass into spice mixture. 双重过滤 cocktail into prepared glass. 装饰： radish wheel (if not salting rim).
en: Add bitters, radish, and cucumber slices to a mixing glass. Muddle to break down and release flavors. Add vodka and syrup. Add ice and shake well. If rimming the glass, moisten half of the cocktail glass with a lemon wedge, then roll that side of the glass in the spice mixture. Double strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with a radish wheel (if not salting the rim).

zh: 萝卜片
en: Radish slice

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰充分摇匀。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： fresh raspberry.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with fresh raspberries.

zh: 新鲜覆盆子
en: Fresh raspberry

zh: Add all ingredients to mixing glass and 不加冰干摇 for 5 seconds. Add ice and shake for 10 seconds. 双重过滤 into chilled cocktail glass. 装饰： lemon peel.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass and dry shake without ice for 5 seconds. Add ice and shake for 10 seconds. Double strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.

zh: Add all ingredients except bitters to Collins glass. Fill with pellet ice. Swizzle or stir with bar spoon for 10 seconds, bringing the ice from the bottom of glass to the top, ensuring that ingredients are well integrated and cold. Top with bitters and serve with straw.
en: Add all ingredients except bitters to a Collins glass. Fill with pellet ice. Swizzle or stir with a bar spoon for 10 seconds, bringing the ice from the bottom to the top to ensure ingredients are well integrated and chilled. Top with bitters and serve with a straw.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌30秒。 Strain into Old Fashioned glass with large ice cubes or sphere. 装饰： lemon peel.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 30 seconds. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass over large ice cubes or a sphere. Garnish with a lemon peel.

zh: 将所有配料加入调酒杯中。 加冰搅拌15秒。 过滤至冰镇的鸡尾酒杯中。 装饰： lemon peel.
en: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and stir for 15 seconds. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass. Garnish with a lemon peel.

zh: 将冰镇苏打水加入小柯林斯杯或平底杯中。
en: Add chilled soda water to a small Collins glass or rocks glass.

zh: 将剩余配料加入调酒玻璃杯中。
en: Add remaining ingredients to a mixing glass.

zh: 双重过滤至冰镇的柯林斯杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled Collins glass.

zh: 将糖和冷水加入冰镇的古典杯中。
en: Add sugar and cold water to a chilled Old Fashioned glass.

zh: 将柠檬挤汁入杯。
en: Squeeze lemon juice into the glass.

zh: 丢弃柠檬壳并搅拌均匀。
en: Discard the lemon peel and stir well.

zh: 加入威士忌和大方冰。
en: Add whiskey and large ice cubes.

zh: 短暂搅拌均匀，然后用吧勺背面缓慢倒入红酒使其漂浮在表面。
en: Stir briefly to combine, then slowly pour red wine over the back of a bar spoon to float it on top.

zh: 在调酒玻璃杯中加冰。
en: Add ice to a mixing glass.

zh: 加入配料并充分摇和。
en: Add ingredients and shake well.

zh: 用现磨肉豆蔻装饰。
en: Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.

zh: Add ingredients to mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. 过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。
en: Add ingredients to a mixing glass. Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: Add ice and shake well. 过滤至装满碎冰的冰镇马天尼杯中。
en: Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass filled with crushed ice.

zh: 用一片鲜草莓装饰。
en: Garnish with a fresh strawberry slice.

zh: 一片鲜草莓
en: Fresh strawberry slice

zh: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds to integrate. 过滤至装满碎冰的高脚杯或古典杯中。
en: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds to integrate. Strain into a stemmed glass or Old Fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.

zh: 加冰搅拌15秒。
en: Add ice and stir for 15 seconds.

zh: Add ice and shake well. 过滤至冰镇的马天尼杯中。
en: Add ice and shake well. Strain into a chilled martini glass.

zh: Add ice and shake well. 过滤至装有大方冰或球冰的古典杯中。
en: Add ice and shake well. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass filled with large ice cubes or a sphere.

zh: 用一颗八角漂浮在表面装饰。
en: Garnish with a star anise floating on the surface.

zh: 八角
en: Star anise

zh: 将除苏打水外的所有配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add all ingredients except soda water into the mixing glass.

zh: 将前三种配料加入调酒杯中。
en: Add the first three ingredients into the mixing glass.

zh: 双重过滤至冰镇的古典杯中。
en: Double strain into a chilled old-fashioned glass.

zh: 在中心加入一撮五香粉作为装饰。
en: Garnish with a pinch of five-spice powder in the center.

zh: 五香粉
en: Five-spice powder

zh: 扭转橙皮释放油脂，然后丢弃。
en: Twist the orange peel to release oils, then discard.

zh: 橙皮油脂
en: Orange peel oils
